chapter_title.en: Chapter 55 – The marriage without a guardian

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/127)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/127)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ لَا يَنْقُضُ النِّكَاحَ إِلَّا الْأَبُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, form Ali Bin Raib, from Zurara Bin Ayn who said,
‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘None can revoke the marriage except for the father’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from ibn Mahbub from ibn Ri’ab from Zurarah ibn ‘A‘yan who has said the following: “I once heard abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘No one other than a father can revoke a marriage.
